name: Butterfly Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
2. Blend together the egg, milk, shortening, and orange rind in a separate bowl.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture all at once, stirring only until the flour is moistened.
4. Fill greased muffin pans 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Arrange 2 orange sections on each muffin in opposite directions to form a butterfly design.
6. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
